title: melaleuca leucadendra var. viridiflora
intro: Melaleuca leucadendra var. viridiflora, also known as the Green Lemon Myrtle or Lemon Myrtle, is a plant species within the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic compounds. The plant's leaves have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin infections, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Melaleuca leucadendra var. viridiflora, such as essential oils and teas, are often used to support immune function, alleviate coughs and colds, and soothe sore throats.
